case_title: PIERCE, SCOTT G. VS VAN DERMEER, BARBARA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,075.00 FILED BY PIERCE, SCOTT G. AS TO DEFENDANT VAN DERMEER, BARBARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $908.00 FILED BY VAN DERMEER, BARBARA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PIERCE, SCOTT G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CERT MAIL TO BARBARA VAN DERMEER RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PIERCE, SCOTT G. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VAN DERMEER, BARBARA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PIERCE, SCOTT G. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
